PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+commit"; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "(?<=-m\s*|--message[= ])[\x27\"]\K[^\x27\"]+"); if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qP "^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert)(\(.+\))?!?:\s.+"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message does not follow Conventional Commits format." >&2; echo "Expected: type(scope): description" >&2; echo "Got: $MSG" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'
PreToolUse.windows: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+commit"; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP "(?<=-m\s*|--message[= ])[\x27\"]\K[^\x27\"]+"); if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qP "^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert)(\(.+\))?!?:\s.+"; then echo "BLOCKED: Commit message does not follow Conventional Commits format." >&2; echo "Expected: type(scope): description" >&2; echo "Got: $MSG" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'
